name: angular-eslint-injection-context
description: Angular injection context lint rules for ESLint
author: Cyrille Tuzi

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp src/package.json dist/package.json && cp src/LICENSE dist/LICENSE && cp src/README.md dist/README.md
scripts.release: if test $VERSION; then npm run build && cd src && npm version $VERSION --no-git-tag-version && git add package.json && cd .. && git commit -m "release" && npm version $VERSION && git push; fi
